description_cn:
使网格的每一条边的长度按照长度系数发生变化。长度系数默认为1。

设置网格的边长。
description_en:
This makes the length of each edge of the mesh vary according to a length factor. The default length factor is 1.

Set the side length of the grid.

parameters.name: Mesh
parameters.desc_en: Mesh to set edge lengths for

parameters.name: LengthFactor
parameters.desc_cn: 目标边缘长度为当前长度的倍数
parameters.desc_en: Target edge length as a multiple of current length

author: Kangaroo Team
